title: DAO Maker - Community Investigates
relevance_summary: Governance proposal with flash-loaned votes on DAO

prevention.rule: Block any tx that calls governance functions with flash-loaned funds

monitoring_rules: Block any tx that calls governance functions with flash-loaned funds
summary: DAO Maker faced a governance attack where the team attempted to manipulate a vote using flash loans. Users are concerned about the team's attempt to avoid fulfilling their compensation plan. A guard could prevent such attacks by blocking any governance function calls made with flash-loaned funds.
